text: Being here, I experience a peculiar blend of curiosity and vulnerability. The sleek modernity of the glass meeting room invites order and clarity, but also highlights my presence as both observer and participant. When I turn to the second space, the bold colors and thoughtful displays confront me with questions about perception and intention. The quoted words resonate with an inner turbulence—echoing my own uncertainties about being seen, understood, or perhaps misunderstood. I am both a witness and a subject here, reflecting on the delicate interplay between self and society in these meticulously designed environments.
